title: SOUNDSTORM OS — AI Action Proposal
description: Standard JSON schema for AI-generated proposals. AI agents produce proposals only; the OS executes them.

proposal_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this proposal (UUID v4)

agent_id.description: Identifier of the AI agent submitting the proposal

mode.description: Execution mode — determines the level of human approval required

risk_level.description: Risk classification of the proposed actions

actions.description: Ordered list of atomic actions to be executed by the OS

confidence_score.description: Agent confidence in this proposal, between 0.0 (none) and 1.0 (certain)

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this individual action

path.description: JSONPath expression targeting the data location (e.g. $.stages[0].subtracks[2].status)

new_value.description: Value to set. Use null for delete actions.

reversible.description: Whether this action can be safely rolled back
